name: Media Bar
author: grimmdev
description: A featured content slideshow bar on the Jellyfin home page. Showcases backdrop images, logos, ratings, genres, and plot summaries for your media with auto-advancing slides, navigation arrows, and play/detail/favourite buttons. Configure a playlist ID for curated content or let it pick from your latest additions automatically.

vars.name: Playlist ID
vars.description: Jellyfin item ID of a playlist to use as the source for the bar. Leave blank to use the latest additions from your library.

vars.name: Manual Item IDs
vars.description: Comma-separated list of Jellyfin item IDs to feature. Ignored if Playlist ID is set.

vars.name: Number of Items
vars.description: How many items to show in the bar (1–20).

vars.name: Slide Interval (ms)
vars.description: How long each slide is shown before auto-advancing. Default is 8000 (8 seconds).

vars.name: Shuffle Items
vars.description: Randomise the order of items each time the bar loads.

name: Are you still watching?
author: grimmdev
description: Shows an 'Are you still watching?' prompt after a period of inactivity during playback. If not dismissed, the player exits automatically. Fully configurable timing, text, and colours.

vars.name: Idle Time (minutes)
vars.description: How many minutes of uninterrupted playback before the prompt appears. Default is 180 (3 hours).

vars.name: Prompt Timeout (seconds)
vars.description: How many seconds the prompt stays on screen before the player exits. Default is 60.

vars.name: Prompt Message
vars.description: The heading text shown on the prompt overlay.

vars.name: Button Label
vars.description: Text on the continue watching button.

vars.name: Button Color
vars.description: Background color of the continue watching button.

vars.name: Text Color
vars.description: Color of the prompt heading and countdown text.

vars.name: Overlay Background
vars.description: Background color of the overlay. Use rgba() for transparency, e.g. rgba(0,0,0,0.85).

name: Media Request
author: grimmdev
description: Adds a Request Media button to the left-hand navigation menu. Users can submit requests for movies, TV shows, music, or any configured media type. Requests are stored server-side and optionally forwarded to a webhook (Discord, Slack, custom).

vars.name: Menu Button Label
vars.description: Text shown on the navigation menu button.

vars.name: Accent Color
vars.description: Color used for the submit button and input focus ring.

vars.name: Media Types
vars.description: Comma-separated list of request types shown in the dropdown. e.g. Movie, TV Show, Music, Anime, Other
vars.default: Movie, TV Show, Music, Anime, Other

vars.name: Webhook URL
vars.description: Optional. POST each new request to this URL (Discord, Slack, or any HTTP endpoint). Leave blank to disable.

vars.name: Webhook Secret
vars.description: Optional. If set, signs the webhook payload with HMAC-SHA256 and adds an X-Hub-Signature-256 header.
